channel.title: terminal on Delnegend's Cave
channel.description: Recent content in terminal on Delnegend's Cave

item.title: Clearing old commits from a repository
item.description: Use case A repository that hosts a static website. Steps Creating a new branch 1 git checkout -b <new_branch_name> Adding files to the new branch 1 2 git add -A git commit -m "Initial commit" Deleting the old branch 1 git branch -D <old_branch_name> Renaming the new branch 1 git branch -m <new_branch_name> References How can I delete old commits in Github via terminal? | Usama Baig, zx485
